channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-18642] sanity test_60a: test failed, see FAILED test_60a messages for specifics
item.description:
test_60a failed with the following error:

test failed, see FAILED test_60a messages for specifics
CMD: trevis-103vm20 /usr/sbin/llog_reader O/1/d12/6c
trevis-103vm20: llog_reader: Could not open the file O/1/d12/6c.: No such file or directory (2)
pdsh@trevis-103vm10: trevis-103vm20: ssh exited with exit code 254
CMD: trevis-103vm20 /usr/sbin/llog_reader O/1/d12/6c
trevis-103vm20: llog_reader: Could not open the file O/1/d12/6c.: No such file or directory (2)
pdsh@trevis-103vm10: trevis-103vm20: ssh exited with exit code 254
/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/sanity.sh: line 8558: [: !=: unary operator expected
CMD: trevis-103vm20 /usr/sbin/llog_reader O/1/d12/6c
trevis-103vm20: llog_reader: Could not open the file O/1/d12/6c.: No such file or directory (2)
pdsh@trevis-103vm10: trevis-103vm20: ssh exited with exit code 254
FAILED test_60a wrong obj path /, should be O/1/d12/6c
CMD: trevis-103vm20 grep -c /mnt/lustre-mds1' ' /proc/mounts || true
Stopping /mnt/lustre-mds1 (opts:) on trevis-103vm20
CMD: trevis-103vm20 umount -d /mnt/lustre-mds1
CMD: trevis-103vm20 lsmod | grep lnet > /dev/null &&
lctl dl | grep ' ST ' || true
CMD: trevis-103vm20 mkdir -p /mnt/lustre-mds1
CMD: trevis-103vm20 dmsetup status /dev/mapper/mds1_flakey >/dev/null 2>&1
CMD: trevis-103vm20 dmsetup status /dev/mapper/mds1_flakey 2>&1
CMD: trevis-103vm20 test -b /dev/mapper/mds1_flakey
CMD: trevis-103vm20 e2label /dev/mapper/mds1_flakey
Starting mgs:   /dev/mapper/mds1_flakey /mnt/lustre-mds1
CMD: trevis-103vm20 mkdir -p /mnt/lustre-mds1; mount -t lustre   /dev/mapper/mds1_flakey /mnt/lustre-mds1
CMD: trevis-103vm20 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n health_check
CMD: trevis-103vm20 PATH=/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/usr/lib/lustre/tests:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/opt/iozone/bin:/opt/iozone/bin:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/mpi:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/racer:/usr/lib64/lustre/../lustre-iokit/sgpdd-survey:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/usr/lib64/lustre/utils/gss:/usr/lib64/lustre/utils:/opt/iozone/bin:/usr/lib64/openmpi/bin:/usr/share/Modules/bin:/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/usr/sbin:/sbin::/sbin:/bin:/usr/sbin: NAME=autotest_config bash rpc.sh set_default_debug \"vfstrace rpctrace dlmtrace neterror ha config ioctl super lfsck\" \"all\" 4 
trevis-103vm20: trevis-103vm20.trevis.whamcloud.com: executing set_default_debug vfstrace rpctrace dlmtrace neterror ha config ioctl super lfsck all 4
CMD: trevis-103vm20 e2label /dev/mapper/mds1_flakey 				2>/dev/null | grep -E ':[a-zA-Z]{3}[0-9]{4}'
pdsh@trevis-103vm10: trevis-103vm20: ssh exited with exit code 1
CMD: trevis-103vm20 e2label /dev/mapper/mds1_flakey 2>/dev/null
Started lustre-MDT0000
 sanity test_60a: @@@@@@ FAIL: test failed, see FAILED test_60a messages for specifics 
  Trace dump:
  = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:6758:error()
  = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/sanity.sh:8582:test_60a()
  = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:7090:run_one()
  = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:7151:run_one_logged()
  = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:6974:run_test()
  = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/sanity.sh:8584:main()
item.summary: sanity test_60a: test failed, see FAILED test_60a messages for specifics

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment: emoly.liu can you please tell which exact patch fixes the problem?
try to add some echo to verify that code is actually called. in my local testing this never happens.

Oh, I just realize that mater already has this fix:

obj_file=$mntpt/$(ost_fid2_objpath mgs $fid) ;;

this is due to changes in LU-17923 lod: update layout ver for mirror merge/split
in the majority of runs there is no fids found in lustre log dumped few lines above with lctl dk, so objects to check. this is why LU-17923 patch passed.
